race.comment: ELLISMAYNE (1) has been racing over further and at the provincials in recent efforts and should appreciate this scenario today. McDougall hops aboard here and her maiden win did come in country grade. Looks well placed here and can bounce back to winning ways. SMASHING LULU (2) was too good in her only run last campaign, running over the top to score 97 days ago at Queanbeyan. This shapes nicely and she looks a nice filly on the way up. Won't be far away. SHOWTIME MAGGIE (11) ended last campaign in good order and can pick up from where she left off. CALLENEM THRU (10) comes through a good form race fresh where she pulled up with an issue. Expecting a better performance here.
